title: Suez Canal blocked — 14-day closure
historical_analogue: 2021 Ever Given grounding (blocked Suez 6 days, ~$9B/day impact)
description: A vessel grounds in the Suez Canal and blocks all traffic for 14 days. 12% of global trade is rerouted around the Cape of Good Hope, adding 10+ days transit. Just-in-time manufacturing across Europe and Asia is severely disrupted.
